message:
refactor(tests,benches): idiomatic Rust cleanups and clearer naming

Tests:
- Replace vec![] with array literal for static expected values
- Rename task_a_id/task_b_id to task_sender_id/task_receiver_id for clarity
- Change run_lab_test to accept &Arc instead of owned Arc (avoids needless clone)
- Use Arc::clone() instead of .clone() per Clippy convention
- Simplify match-on-result to let _ = result for don't-care branches
- Use inline format args (format!("{x:#x}") instead of format!("{:#x}", x))
- Add reason strings to #[ignore] attributes for CI documentation
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on Bytes before decode in HPACK test

Benchmarks:
- Rename encoder/decoder locals to hpack_encoder/hpack_decoder to avoid
  shadowing ambiguity with other codec types in scope
- Use typed integer literals (16u32) to eliminate as-casting
- Replace as-cast with u64::from() for lossless widening
- Simplify stealer creation by removing unnecessary let binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
